column1: # /File Save — filename prompt + commit, writes to CWD.
# Slice 1 covers the simple case: open the prompt, type a filename,
# commit.  The Cancel/Replace/Backup submenu (when the target already
# exists) lands in a later slice.
# The transcript writes to target/m4_file_save_acceptance.xlsx — the
# target/ dir is always present and gitignored.  We verify UI state
# only; the on-disk round-trip is covered by an app-level unit test
# Seed one cell so the workbook has something to save.
# /FS opens the filename prompt.  Mode stays MENU while the prompt
# is active (reusing the menu mode for command-argument input).
# Type a filename — buffer appears on line 2.
# Commit — returns to READY, pointer unchanged.
